properties.info_box: Following the Friday Stroll, we continue LFNW 2026 with the Friday Social on April 24th from 5pm-10pm at Beach Cat Brewery's South Paw location in Bellingham. This year we are merging the Social and Game Night into a single location! We'll have some games organized, Beach Cat has some pub games onsite, and feel free to bring your own games. No host. Full Dinner Menu Available via Food Trucks onsite.
properties.label: Friday Events

properties.info_box: Our day kicks off with the Saturday Breakfast on April 25th from 7:00am to 9:00am at Grouchy's Diner (formerly Diamond Jim's Grill). Prepare for the day of shared learning and socializing with a full stomach!
properties.label: Saturday Breakfast

properties.info_box: Welcome to LFNW 2026! Join us for presentations, discussions, and socializing inspired by Open Source Hardware and Software. Free! Saturday Educational Sessions and Expo Hall are hosted at Bellingham Technical College on April 25th from 9:00am to 6:00pm. Note: There is no formal registration process for the LFNW 2026 Educational Sessions and Expo Hall components.
properties.label: Enter Here
